backend/main.mo: Actor storing admission submissions in a map, allowing public creation and admin-only listing with timestamping.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping mascot-related features to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining CSS variables for themes, dark mode overrides, and global background/text styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all site routes and wraps the app in theme and class-selection providers.
frontend/src/components/admissions/Admis: Admission form component using react-hook-form to collect and submit student enquiry data.
frontend/src/components/learning/Alphabe: Scrollable picker component rendering alphabet or number buttons with selection highlighting.
frontend/src/components/learning/ClassSe: Select dropdown bound to class selection context for choosing class levels.
frontend/src/components/learning/Tracing: Canvas-based tracing tool allowing users to draw strokes, undo, and practice writing characters.
frontend/src/components/math/MathSection: Renders tabbed math sections and displays PracticeCards for each problem in a scrollable tab layout.
frontend/src/components/math/PracticeCar: Shows an interactive math practice card with answer input, correctness checking, and optional explanations.
Displays GK questions in an accordion list with numbered items and expandable answers.
frontend/src/components/rhymes/RhymeCard: Presents a rhyme card with title, description, and a button to trigger audio/video playback.
frontend/src/components/rhymes/RhymePlay: Modal player for rhyme audio/video with tabbed media sections and optional lyrics display.
frontend/src/components/site/AnimatedSec: Wraps content with scroll-triggered animations using IntersectionObserver and configurable effects.
frontend/src/components/site/BrandLogo.t: Shows the site’s logo and name with small hover animations.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with copyright, branding, and a brief description.
frontend/src/components/site/GenderSelec: Provides toggle buttons to switch between girl and boy themes using context.
frontend/src/components/site/HeaderNav.t: Creates the site header with logo, navigation links, gender selector, and a mobile slide-out menu.
Defines the main site layout with header, routed content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/site/SubjectIcon: Displays a subject-specific icon using a sprite sheet and coordinate mapping.
frontend/src/components/social/TopicCard: Shows a social studies topic card with icon, title, description, and optional content.
frontend/src/content/contact.ts: Exports school contact information including address, email, phone, and social links.
frontend/src/content/gk.ts: Defines GK question types and provides grade-level question sets for various classes.
frontend/src/content/math.ts: Defines math problem and section interfaces and provides grade‑wise math content with simple counting, shapes, addition, and subtraction problems.
frontend/src/content/rhymes.ts: Defines a rhyme interface and exports a list of classic nursery rhymes with titles, descriptions, and lyrics.
frontend/src/content/socialStudies.ts: Defines social studies content structures and supplies grade‑wise topics and Q&A for basic community, family, and geography concepts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateAdmissionSub: Provides a mutation hook that submits admission form data using the backend actor and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context with login, logout, identity loading, and status management using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and multiple theme variables for default, dark, and gender‑specific color schemes.
frontend/src/learning/classLevels.ts: Defines class level types and metadata plus helper functions for retrieving labels and display names.
frontend/src/learning/ClassSelectionCont: Provides a React context for managing and persisting the selected class level using sessionStorage.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: Renders an admissions form with animated UI and a submission success screen.
frontend/src/pages/AlphabetNumbersPage.t: Provides an interface for selecting and tracing alphabets or numbers with a preview card and canvas.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays contact information cards including address, email, phone, and social links with animations.
Shows GK questions based on the selected class with class selector and animated sections.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Implements the homepage with a hero section and feature cards linking to learning modules.
frontend/src/pages/LearnPage.tsx: Renders the main learning hub with class selector and cards linking to different learning modules. Includes animated mascots and responsive module cards.
frontend/src/pages/MathematicsPage.tsx: Displays math practice sections filtered by selected class, with a class selector and animated header mascot. Uses MathSectionTabs to show class‑specific math content.
frontend/src/pages/RhymesPage.tsx: Shows a grid of rhyme cards and opens a player for the selected rhyme. Uses animations and state to control rhyme playback.
frontend/src/pages/SocialStudiesPage.tsx: Loads social studies topics and Q&A based on selected class, rendering topic cards and question lists with animated sections. Includes class selector and styled content blocks.
frontend/src/theme/GenderThemeContext.ts: Provides a context for selecting and persisting a gender‑based theme, applying a data attribute to the document root. Stores the chosen theme in localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, supporting both standard and hash‑based routing. Includes helpers for persistent URL parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, fonts, animations, shadows, and container settings. Adds custom kid‑friendly animations and integrates plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, requirements, known issues, and design goals for the educational website. Describes theming issues, needed images, and implemented features.
